## Summary
<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs

## Verification
<!-- Check all that apply. Delete lines that don't apply. -->
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run bundle:android && (cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug)` succeeds
- [ ] Tested on a physical arm64 device
- [ ] Tested the affected feature end-to-end
